---
title: "How much is home advantage worth in the World Cup?"
author: "John Knight"
draft: TRUE
---

*Intro & recap of last article. But how much is it worth, and has it changed over time?*

*Some basic overall stats re WC home adv. Real examples.*

*Introduce Elo model with calibration to show it works, and use that to show more accurate home adv overall and per WC.*

*What is driving this? List possible factors.*

*Compare with other major competitions. Does this suggest travel distance or time zones may be a factor? Use real examples.*

*Look at confederation home advantage.*

*More directly analyse travel distance, time zones, climate etc.*

*What does this suggest for this summer? USA/Canada/Mexico hosts.*
